message:
Add target input to customize directory name in news repo

Allow syncing from repos like `platform-internal` to a different
directory name like `platform/`. The `target` input defaults to
the `project` name if not specified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,10 @@ inputs:
       Project name (usually not needed - defaults to source repo name)
     required: false
     default: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
+  target:
+    description: Target directory name in news repo (defaults to project name)
+    required: false
+    default: ""
   path:
     description: Path to changelog in source repo
     required: false
@@ -22,7 +26,7 @@ inputs:
   token:
     description: GitHub token with workflow trigger permissions
     required: true
-  target:
+  target_repo:
     description: Target repository to sync to
     required: false
     default: tenzir/news
@@ -40,9 +44,10 @@ runs:
         GH_TOKEN: ${{ inputs.token }}
       run: |
         gh workflow run sync.yaml \
-          --repo "${{ inputs.target }}" \
+          --repo "${{ inputs.target_repo }}" \
           --ref "${{ inputs.ref }}" \
           --field project="${{ inputs.project }}" \
+          --field target="${{ inputs.target }}" \
           --field path="${{ inputs.path }}" \
           --field extra_paths="${{ inputs.extra_paths }}" \
           --field skip_notifications="${{ inputs.skip_notifications }}"

@@ -6,9 +6,13 @@ on:
       # The validation step verifies via GitHub API that the repository exists
       # in the tenzir organization, rejecting path traversal and typos.
       project:
-        description: "Project to sync (any tenzir/* repo)"
+        description: "Source repository to sync (any tenzir/* repo)"
         required: true
         type: string
+      target:
+        description: "Target directory name (defaults to project name)"
+        required: false
+        type: string
       path:
         description: "Path to changelog directory in source repo"
         required: false
@@ -48,6 +52,12 @@ jobs:
           private-key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
           owner: tenzir
 
+      - name: Resolve target directory
+        id: resolve
+        run: |
+          target="${{ inputs.target }}"
+          echo "dir=${target:-${{ inputs.project }}}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
       - name: Checkout repository
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -76,13 +86,13 @@ jobs:
           # Record existing unreleased entries and release notes before sync
           # Only track unreleased/ - entries in releases/*/entries/ are archived
           # copies that were already notified when they were unreleased
-          find "${{ inputs.project }}" -path "*/unreleased/*.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/entries-before.txt || true
-          find "${{ inputs.project }}" -path "*/releases/*/notes.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/releases-before.txt || true
+          find "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" -path "*/unreleased/*.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/entries-before.txt || true
+          find "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" -path "*/releases/*/notes.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/releases-before.txt || true
 
       - name: Sync changelog
         run: |
-          mkdir -p "${{ inputs.project }}/changelog"
-          rsync -av --delete "/tmp/source/${{ inputs.path }}/" "${{ inputs.project }}/changelog/"
+          mkdir -p "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/changelog"
+          rsync -av --delete "/tmp/source/${{ inputs.path }}/" "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/changelog/"
 
       - name: Sync extra paths
         if: inputs.extra_paths != ''
@@ -91,8 +101,8 @@ jobs:
           for pattern in ${{ inputs.extra_paths }}; do
             for path in $pattern; do
               if [[ -d "$path" ]]; then
-                mkdir -p "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/${{ inputs.project }}/$path"
-                rsync -av --delete "$path/" "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/${{ inputs.project }}/$path/"
+                mkdir -p "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/$path"
+                rsync -av --delete "$path/" "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/$path/"
               fi
             done
           done
@@ -112,31 +122,31 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           # Find new unreleased entries only - released entries were already
           # notified when they were in unreleased/
-          find "${{ inputs.project }}" -path "*/unreleased/*.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/entries-after.txt || true
+          find "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" -path "*/unreleased/*.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/entries-after.txt || true
           comm -13 /tmp/entries-before.txt /tmp/entries-after.txt > /tmp/new-entries.txt || true
 
           # Send notification for each new entry
           while IFS= read -r entry; do
             [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
             echo "Notifying Discord about new entry: $entry"
-            python .github/scripts/discord-notify.py entry "${{ inputs.project }}" "$entry" "$DISCORD_CHANGELOG_WEBHOOK" || true
+            python .github/scripts/discord-notify.py entry "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" "$entry" "$DISCORD_CHANGELOG_WEBHOOK" || true
             sleep 1  # Rate limiting
           done < /tmp/new-entries.txt
 
       - name: Notify Discord of new releases
         if: env.DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK != '' && !inputs.skip_notifications
         run: |
           # Find new release notes
-          find "${{ inputs.project }}" -path "*/releases/*/notes.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/releases-after.txt || true
+          find "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" -path "*/releases/*/notes.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/releases-after.txt || true
           comm -13 /tmp/releases-before.txt /tmp/releases-after.txt > /tmp/new-releases.txt || true
 
           # Send notification for each new release
           while IFS= read -r notes_file; do
             [[ -z "$notes_file" ]] && continue
             # Extract version from path (e.g., project/changelog/releases/v1.0.0/notes.md -> v1.0.0)
             version=$(echo "$notes_file" | sed -n 's|.*/releases/\([^/]*\)/notes.md|\1|p')
-            echo "Notifying Discord about new release: ${{ inputs.project }} $version"
-            python .github/scripts/discord-notify.py release "${{ inputs.project }}" "$version" "$notes_file" "$DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK" || true
+            echo "Notifying Discord about new release: ${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }} $version"
+            python .github/scripts/discord-notify.py release "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" "$version" "$notes_file" "$DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK" || true
             sleep 1  # Rate limiting
           done < /tmp/new-releases.txt

@@ -52,9 +52,18 @@ jobs:
 The action uses sensible defaults:
 
 - `project`: repository name (e.g., `mcp` for `tenzir/mcp`)
+- `target`: same as `project` (directory name in this repo)
 - `path`: `changelog` (path to changelog directory in source repo)
 
-Override these by passing additional inputs to the action if needed.
+Override these by passing additional inputs to the action if needed. For example,
+to sync from `tenzir/platform-internal` to `platform/` in this repo:
+
+```yaml
+- uses: tenzir/news/.github/actions/sync@main
+  with:
+    token: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
+    target: platform
+```
 
 For initial imports with existing changelog entries, add `skip_notifications: true`
 to avoid flooding Discord, then remove it after the first sync.
